title: Vexi's Enhanced
description: a Fabric modpack focused on overall fps improvements, better performance, and smoother gameplay.
body:
# Vexi's Enhanced

Vexi's Enhanced is a Fabric modpack that boosts FPS for smoother gameplay. It features performance mods for a lightweight, seamless Minecraft experience. Perfect for enhancing performance on any system.


## Features

**Vexi's Enhanced** enhances your Minecraft experience with a variety of features and improvements including:
- Optimized RAM Usage
- Customizable Settings
- Improved Models
- Enhanced Rendering
  
## Compatibility
Currently, **Vexi's Enhanced** supports Minecraft versions 1.21 and 1.20.1 More versions will be added in the future.

## Included Mods
<details>
  <summary>Click to view list of mods</summary>

- **Fabric API**
- **Cloth Config API**
- **YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)**
- **Fabric Language Kotlin**
- **Sodium**
- **Sodium Extra**
- **Reese's Sodium Options**
- **Iris Shaders**
- **Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)**
- **Enhanced Block Entities**
- **Entity Culling**
- **More Culling**
- **FerriteCore**
- **Dynamic FPS**
- **Indium**
- **Lithium**
- **Noisium**
- **BadOptimizations**
- **Debugify**
- **Clumps**
- **Cull Less Leaves**
- **ImmediatelyFast**
- **Krypton**
- **LazyDFU**
- **Memory Leak Fix**
- **ModMenu**
- **ModernFix**
- **StarLight (Fabric)**
- **ThreadTweak**
- **Very Many Players**
- And Much More!

</details>



## Performance Comparison
| Modpack          | Vanilla | Sodium | Vexi's Enhanced |
|------------------|---------|--------|------------------|
| **FPS** (Range)  | 1 - 213  | 102 - 391 | 124 - 659 |

Tested on a low-end PC in a flat-world ( 1.20.1 ).

## Laptop Specs
<details>
  <summary>Click to view PC specifications</summary>
  
  - **CPU**: Intel i5-8250U CPU @ 1.60GHz   1.80 GHz
  - **RAM**: 8 GB
  - **GPU**: Intel(R) UHD Graphics 620
  - **System**: 64-bit OS, x64-based processor
</details>

## Installation
1. Install **Modrinth app**.
2. Log in and search for **"Vexi’s Enhanced"**.
3. Download and install the latest version.


## Support & Feedback
Join my **[Discord Server]([https://discord.gg/2YSGtYF944)** for support, bug reports, or feedback.
